message:
fix(fcp-oauth): clamp expires_in before i64 conversion to prevent overflow

The OAuth token response's expires_in field (u64) was passed directly to
i64::try_from which could theoretically produce values exceeding
chrono::Duration::seconds' safe range on extremely large inputs. Now
clamps to u32::MAX (~136 years) before conversion, maintaining safety
without affecting any realistic token lifetime.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
